name: Lyrilusc - Phantom Feathers
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＬＬ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リリカル・ルスキニア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>比</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>翼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>麗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Lyrical Luscinia - Beautiful Birds of a Feather
desc: Target 1 "Lyrilusc" monster you control; the ATK of all monsters your opponent currently controls become that monster's current ATK, also their Levels/Ranks become 1. When an opponent's monster declares an attack on your "Lyrilusc" monster: You can banish this card from your GY; your monster's ATK becomes that opponent's monster's ATK, until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Lyrilusc - Phantom Feathers" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Lyrilusc" monster you control; the ATK of all monsters your opponent currently controls become that monster's current ATK, also their Levels/Ranks become 1. When an opponent's monster declares an attack on your "Lyrilusc" monster: You can banish this card from your GY; your monster's ATK becomes that opponent's monster's ATK, until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Lyrilusc - Phantom Feathers" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
